but you dont use latitude and logitudes

The map was created using administrative divisions of Karnataka, which do not rely solely on latitude and longitude coordinates but rather on predefined district boundaries. These boundaries are based on the official administrative structure recognized by the state government and widely used in geographical datasets.

If you need a map that incorporates specific latitude and longitude data or have any other requirements, please let me know!
